text: With the release of episode 5 of the

It deals with a group of digital

is trying to find an exit, mostly
because she doesn't think that there's a

At the end of the first two chapter, we

And while Pomni is having this internal

And then we see this message pop up at

Basically allowing Pomni to now hear the

Put down in the comments who you think

In the next chapter, we get to see a
